rationale: The round-2 decomposition blockers are addressed. I parsed the plan frontmatter at 07eb467e: there are exactly four work_chunks, every depends_on is [], computed chain depth is 0, and no key_file_paths entry appears in more than one chunk. The domain-doc targets are bead-unique and are real files under .mindspec/domains/: B1 uses workflow/execution/core/context-system architecture docs, B2 uses workflow/overview.md, B3 uses workflow/interfaces.md plus core/overview.md, and B4 uses workflow/runbook.md. This preserves the four-bead independent cut while satisfying doc-sync with no shared declared file surface. The plan remains gate-forward and falsifiable for this lens.

findings.detail: Parsed work_chunks frontmatter contains duplicate_count=0 across all key_file_paths. The prior shared workflow/core domain-doc paths have been moved to bead-unique targets.

All per-bead doc-sync targets are real files under .mindspec/domains/: context-system/architecture.md, core/architecture.md, core/overview.md, execution/architecture.md, workflow/architecture.md, workflow/interfaces.md, workflow/overview.md, and workflow/runbook.md. Each doc target belongs to exactly one chunk.
The four-bead cut is intact: chunk ids are 1, 2, 3, and 4; every depends_on list is empty; computed chain depth is 0.
